svg.aria-label: April week 3 2026 weekly rollup covering 7 daily security digests : CPUID supply chain breach distributing tampered CPU-Z, n8n Webhooks abused for phishing email delivery, Nginx UI CVE-2026-33032 authentication bypass critical, Marimo pre-auth RCE, PowMix botnet, Mirai variant Nexcorium, Operation PowerOFF takedown coordination.

g.text: CPU-Z tampered build pushed via official channel
